context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 91
WINDOW: 1303.233s to 1339.800s (smile at 1323.233s to 1324.800s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: I came. I said, what do you want me to do? I want you to go home every day in the evening, take care of medications, bring medications from Katowice to Auschwitz. You mean the City of Auschwitz.
[1317.750-1370.660] interviewee: To the City of Auschwitz, yeah. But I said, it's a border. I cannot cross the border between Silesia and the Galicia at Auschwitz was a border. And he said, you go to the commandant in Auschwitz. And you tell him what you want. I go up to office.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
the border between
